warnings: Issue #18 remains an open preserved baseline but is no longer the active architecture mainline for the new SmartGrow requirement.

The phase-1 model-runtime seam, reusable gas-exchange service layer, bounded scenario/sensitivity runtime, additive advisor-contract realignment, dashboard summary runtime surface, tab consumers, Assistant runtime strip, weather fallback resilience, and RTR decision-surface follow-up are now landed on `main`.
Issue #3 remains intentionally blocked because grower-approved tomato/cucumber good-production windows have not yet been supplied for RTR recalibration.

There is still no dedicated frontend interaction-test harness for the summary runtime strip, so current regression coverage relies on backend pytest plus frontend lint/build rather than component-level UI tests.
